data.title: Nvidia's Revenue Wouldn't Be 'Impacted...At All' If It Didn't Invest In CoreWeave: Analyst Explains Reason Behind Neo Cloud Investments
data.description: Nvidia analyst explains why it was important for Jensen Huang to diversify his investments amid recent investments in neo cloud companies.

data.title: Circle's Revenue Grows, But IPO Filing Shows Falling Profitability
data.description: Circle Internet Financial, the company behind USD Coin (CRYPTO: USDC), is showing a mixed financial picture ahead of its planned public listing, with revenue up by 16%, but profitability down due to higher costs

data.title: UnitedHealth Group, PG&E And A Financial Stock On CNBC's 'Final Trades'
Phoenix Motor And InductEV Power Up EV Fleets With Wireless Charging Tech
data.description: Phoenix Motor Inc. and InductEV Inc. have unveiled wireless charging for medium-duty EVs, allowing seamless recharging at bus depots and passenger stops. This breakthrough improves uptime, reduces maintenance costs, and enhances safety by removing high-voltage cable risks.
